questions.question: Write a brief description of the main difference between Bubble Sort and Selection Sort algorithms.
questions.hint: Both are simple sorting algorithms, but Bubble Sort is not a comparison-based sort.

questions.question: Given an array of integers, write a pseudo-code implementation of the Insertion Sort algorithm.
questions.hint: Compare each element with the previously sorted elements.

questions.question: What is the time complexity of Bubble Sort when the input array is already sorted or nearly sorted?
questions.hint: Time complexity is O(n) in all cases.
